MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROBERT MCCURN'S Motion to Strike Portions of Plaintiff's Verified First Amended Complaint. Appearances: Michael Alan Gevertz, Esq. of Soderquist Law Offices, (415) 374-8500 appearing for plaintiff and opposing party; Shannon Stone, Esq. of Millstein & Associates, (415) 348-0348, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and modified its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike is granted in part, and denied in part.
